primary_sources.title: Barisan Nasional registration under Societies Act 1973
Crouch, H. Government and Society in Malaysia (Cornell, 1996)

notes: Successor to the Alliance, formed 1 June 1973 with expanded membership: original three + Gerakan + PPP + PAS (until 1977) + Sabah/Sarawak parties. Governed continuously until GE14 (2018). Severely reduced post-2018: 30 federal seats (2018), 30 (2022). Currently in Unity Govt. Cohesion index reflects post-2018 fragmentation and Court Cluster splits.
